nodes.name: Webhook — Analyse Contract
Set — Extract Contract Data
nodes.notes:
Extracts and structures contract submission data.
Generates unique analysis_id for tracking.

nodes.name: Code — Analyse Contract (RAG Simulation)
nodes.notes:
Simulates RAG contract analysis:
1. Scans contract text for 7 red-flag patterns
2. Applies FTC compliance check by creator niche
3. Calculates contract health score (0-100)
4. Returns verdict: PASS / NEGOTIATE / REJECT
Production: ChromaDB RAG + Claude API replaces pattern matching.
Value: $5,200/year in avoided bad deals.

nodes.name: IF — Reject Contract?
nodes.notes:
TRUE: REJECT verdict (score < 40) → send urgent alert
FALSE: PASS or NEGOTIATE → send standard review report

assignments.name: alert_message
assignments.value: ={{ '⛔ REJECT: ' + $json.brand_name + ' contract is HIGH RISK (score: ' + $json.analysis.contract_health.score + '/100). DO NOT SIGN.' }}

nodes.name: Set — Urgent Reject Alert
nodes.notes:
Flags contract as DO NOT SIGN.
Health score < 40 with critical/high red flags.
Triggers urgent creator notification.

assignments.name: alert_message
assignments.value: ={{ $json.analysis.contract_health.verdict === 'NEGOTIATE' ? '⚠️ NEGOTIATE: ' + $json.analysis.contract_health.risk_summary : '✅ PASS: Contract looks clean. Proceed with standard review.' }}

assignments.name: action_needed
assignments.value: ={{ $json.analysis.contract_health.verdict === 'NEGOTIATE' ? 'Request clause amendments before signing' : 'Standard creator review recommended' }}

nodes.name: Set — Review / Pass Report
nodes.notes:
NEGOTIATE (score 40-69): Flags clauses needing amendment.
PASS (score 70-100): Clean contract confirmation.

nodes.name: Merge — All Results
nodes.notes: Combines REJECT and PASS/NEGOTIATE paths into single output.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'ANALYSIS_COMPLETE', analysis_id: $json.report.analysis_id, verdict: $json.report.contract_health.verdict, health_score: $json.report.contract_health.score, risk_summary: $json.report.contract_health.risk_summary, total_risk_exposure: $json.report.contract_health.total_risk_exposure, alert_level: $json.alert_level, alert_message: $json.alert_message, action_needed: $json.action_needed, red_flags: $json.report.red_flags, recommendations: $json.report.recommendations, ftc_compliance: $json.report.ftc_compliance, estimated_value_protected: $json.report.estimated_value_protected, workflow: 'O3 — RAG Contract Analysis' }, null, 2) }}

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
